description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house with a dark gable roof and white exterior walls, surrounded by landscaped greenery and trees. The property features a spacious driveway with parked cars, a detached garage or guest house, and a backyard with a swimming pool and deck area. The main structure has two visible stories, with a prominent upper-level section and multiple large windows providing ample natural light. The backyard is well-appointed with outdoor seating, a wooden deck, and decorative shrubs and trees. The front entryway is marked by a small porch, steps, and a pathway leading to the sidewalk. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on open outdoor spaces and functional family living.
description: A large, modern two-story house with a dark gable roof, white walls, landscaped yard, driveway, detached garage, and a backyard pool with deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, landscaped front yard, and pathway leading to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and the full length of the house with the backyard pool and deck visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, deck, outdoor seating, and the back facade with large windows and upper-level section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the detached garage, backyard landscaping, and the side of the house with additional trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and grouped sets
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, overhang, and landscaped path leading to the front door
